---
description: "Use when editing Svelte, JS, or CSS files in this Wails frontend. Covers bindings, generated files, and small UI steps."
applyTo: "frontend/src/**/*.{svelte,js,css}"
---

# Frontend

- Keep UI changes small and easy to follow.
- Import Go bindings from `frontend/wailsjs/go/main/App.js`.
- Treat `frontend/wailsjs/` as generated and read-only.
- Prefer step-by-step explanations before code.
- Keep examples short for a small model.
